apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.description: Manage API keys and access permissions.

mcp.title: MCP Setup
mcp.description: Server URL, mcp:access key generation, and ready-to-use client JSON configs.

mcpSetup.title: MCP setup
mcpSetup.subtitle: Use this guide to connect the SPLAT QR MCP server in your LLM client.

serverUrl.title: Server URL
serverUrl.description: Use this URL as the MCP server endpoint.

apiKey.title: Generate an API key with mcp:access
apiKey.step1: Open Settings → Integrations and click “Create key”.
apiKey.step2: In the modal, enable the “mcp:access” permission (or use “MCP key preset” for a standard MCP key).
apiKey.step3: Click “Create key”, copy the token, and store it in your environment variables or client secrets.

status401.title: 401 — invalid key
status401.solution: Verify the Authorization format (Bearer {key}), expiration date, and key value.

status403.title: 403 — missing mcp
status403.solution: Your key does not include mcp:access. Create a new key with that permission.

status429.title: 429 — rate limit
status429.solution: Reduce request frequency, add retry with backoff, and check your plan limits.

accessMode.title: Redirect safety mode

empty.title: No destination domains added
empty.description: Warnings are disabled while whitelist is empty

delete.title: Delete destination domain?
